all.en: Good morning, good afternoon, and good evening to everyone joining today.
all.zh: 向今日所有與會者問早安、午安、晚安。

all.en: Welcome to the monthly bridge call between our six regional offices.
all.zh: 歡迎參加六個區域辦公室的月度連線會議。

all.en: We have colleagues dialing in from London, Frankfurt, Dubai, and Mumbai.
all.zh: 今日有來自倫敦、法蘭克福、杜拜及孟買的同仁連線。

all.en: Singapore and Tokyo teams are also present despite the late local hour.
all.zh: 新加坡與東京團隊雖時間已晚仍出席參與。

all.en: Please keep your microphone muted unless you are speaking.
all.zh: 未發言時請務必將麥克風靜音。

all.en: Background noise reduces audio quality for participants on mobile networks.
all.zh: 背景噪音會降低行動網路使用者的音質。

all.en: Use the raise hand feature if you wish to ask a question.
all.zh: 若想提問請使用舉手功能。

all.en: Today, the agenda covers four main topics in forty-five minutes.
all.zh: 今日議程於 45 分鐘內涵蓋四大主題。

all.en: First, a quick summary of last quarter regional sales performance.
all.zh: 首先，簡要回顧上一季度各區銷售表現。

all.en: Second, an update from the unified pricing project working group.
all.zh: 其次，統一定價專案工作小組的進度更新。

all.en: Third, a status report on the global brand refresh initiative.
all.zh: 第三，全球品牌煥新計畫的狀態報告。

all.en: Fourth, open discussion on shared challenges and best practices.
all.zh: 第四，針對共同挑戰與最佳實務進行公開討論。

all.en: Slides are available in the chat window for offline reference.
all.zh: 投影片已放於聊天視窗以供離線參考。

all.en: Live captions can be turned on through the accessibility menu.
all.zh: 可於協助工具選單開啟即時字幕。

all.en: We strongly encourage everyone to keep cameras on during discussion.
all.zh: 我們強烈建議討論時所有人開啟視訊鏡頭。

all.en: Visual cues help us understand each other across language barriers.
all.zh: 視覺線索有助於跨越語言隔閡相互理解。

all.en: Please remember that the recording is shared only within the company.
all.zh: 請記得本次錄影僅於公司內部分享。

all.en: Do not redistribute slides or screenshots outside our official channels.
all.zh: 請勿將投影片或截圖透過非官方管道散布。

all.en: Action items will be summarized and emailed within twenty-four hours.
all.zh: 行動項目將於 24 小時內彙整後以電子郵件寄發。

all.en: Each owner should confirm receipt and update progress in the tracker.
all.zh: 各負責人應確認收到並於追蹤表更新進度。

all.en: Our next call is scheduled for the second Tuesday of next month.
all.zh: 下次會議訂於下個月第二個週二。

all.en: If your region observes a public holiday, please notify the chair.
all.zh: 若您所在區域當日適逢國定假日，請告知主席。

all.en: Thank you for adjusting your schedules to make this meeting possible.
all.zh: 感謝各位調整行程，讓本次會議得以舉行。

all.en: Let us now hand over to Kenji in Tokyo for the sales update.
all.zh: 現在請東京的 Kenji 為我們報告銷售更新。

all.en: Kenji reports a twelve percent revenue lift in the Tokyo metropolitan region.
all.zh: Kenji 報告東京都會區營收成長了 12%。

all.en: Mumbai followed with strong renewal rates among enterprise software clients.
all.zh: 孟買緊隨在後，企業軟體客戶的續約率表現強勁。

all.en: London noted softer demand from financial services due to market volatility.
all.zh: 倫敦則指出金融服務業因市場波動而需求疲弱。

all.en: Frankfurt highlighted a successful joint promotion with our Austrian partner.
all.zh: 法蘭克福特別強調與奧地利夥伴聯合推廣的成功案例。

all.en: Dubai shared early wins from the new logistics hub in Jebel Ali.
all.zh: 杜拜分享了 Jebel Ali 新物流樞紐的初期成果。

all.en: Singapore proposed aligning regional invoicing templates by the end of June.
all.zh: 新加坡提議於六月底前統一各區發票範本。

all.en: The pricing working group requested input on currency hedging assumptions.
all.zh: 定價工作小組請各方就匯率避險假設提供意見。

all.en: Brand refresh launch dates remain on track across all six regions.
all.zh: 品牌煥新上線日期於六個區域皆按進度進行。

all.en: Several teams asked about onboarding support for the new design system.
all.zh: 多個團隊詢問新設計系統的導入支援事宜。

all.en: We will close today's call with a quick round of closing remarks.
all.zh: 今日會議將以簡短的結語進行收尾。
